content: Tis I do?! The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‘Adolescence’), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 premieres JULY 1, only on Netflix. ENOLA HOLMES 1 and ENOLA HOLMES 2 are NOW PLAYING. Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886 About Netflix: Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. Enola Holmes 3 | Official Teaser | Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
chineseContent: 我就是这样吗？！广受好评的《伊诺拉·福尔摩斯》系列回归，将伊诺拉带离伦敦，她的个人梦想和职业梦想在伦敦碰撞，案件比她之前面对的任何案件都更加复杂和危险。该片由菲利普·巴兰蒂尼（艾美奖获奖导演《青春期》）执导，米莉·博比·布朗、路易斯·帕特里奇、亨利·卡维尔和海伦娜·伯翰·卡特主演。 《埃诺拉·福尔摩斯 3》将于 7 月 1 日首播，仅在 Netflix 上播出。 《ENOLA HOLMES 1》和《ENOLA HOLMES 2》正在播放。在 Netflix 上观看：https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886 关于 Netflix：Netflix 是世界领先的娱乐服务公司之一，提供多种类型和语言的电视剧、电影、游戏和现场节目。会员可以随时随地随意播放、暂停和继续观看，并且可以随时更改计划。埃诺拉·福尔摩斯 3 |官方预告片 | Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
